title_cell: Table S1 Major and trace elements of MORB samples from East Pacific Rise and Southwest Indian Ridge
epr_provenance_note: a Data for EPR MORB are from Li et al. (2019)
extraction_policy: Retain only natural sample rows from Table S1.
Preserve the reported FeOt field; do not substitute Fe2O3.
Attach the section heading as source_region and preserve the Excel row number.
Do not treat modeled values in Tables S2-S6 as observations.
